description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with a prominent thatched turret on one side, giving it a whimsical, storybook appearance. The exterior combines timber framing, whitewashed stone, and wooden planks, with a large stone chimney rising along one wall. A small covered porch and multiple overhangs provide sheltered entry points, while the windows are varied in size and style, some with decorative shutters. The roof is partially thatched and partially shingled, with exposed wooden beams and a unique, conical turret roof. The house sits on a raised wooden platform, with steps leading up to the main entrance. Architectural details such as a pulley system, wooden supports, and textured wall surfaces add to its rustic charm.
description: A whimsical, timber-framed house with a steep gable roof, thatched turret, and stone chimney, featuring varied windows and a raised wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steep gable roof, stone chimney, and a prominent thatched turret on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large wooden platform, thatched roof section, and pulley system extending from the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the gable roof, stone chimney, and a mix of small windows and wooden overhangs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the thatched roof, wooden supports, and the raised platform structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with varied shapes and sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with small covered porch, wooden steps, and decorative overhang
